name: Chicken with Fennel and Olives
recipeIngredient: 8 each Thighs, chicken, broiler/ fryer, boned, skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine lemon juice and white pepper. Add chicken and turn to coat.
2. Heat oil in a saute pan over medium high heat. Add chicken and cook for 5 minutes, turning occasionally.
3. Reduce heat to medium and continue cooking chicken for about 10 minutes or until brown and tender. Transfer chicken to a warm platter.
4. In the same pan, add olives and tomatoes; heat for 2 minutes or until warmed through. Arrange olive mixture around the chicken.
5. Add fennel seeds to the pan and cook for 2 minutes, stirring, until brown. If needed, add more oil to prevent burning.
6. Stir in shallots, garlic, thyme, and bay leaf; cook for 2 minutes.
7. Pour in wine and scrape up any bits from the bottom of the pan. Reduce heat to high and simmer for 2-3 minutes or until the liquid is reduced by half.
8. Add broth, parsley, red pepper flakes, and anchovy paste. Lower heat and let simmer for 10 minutes. Spoon sauce over the chicken.
Serves: 8
